details: Analyzing softcap operation: cap * tanh(x / cap) - looking for tanh-based and parameterized operation references
Found HARDTANH and SOFTSHRINK as parameterized operations - potential references for softcap parameter handling
Found full UnaryOpType enum with TANH, HARDTANH, SOFTSHRINK, SILU, SOFTPLUS and other operations. TANH is key reference for softcap math.
Found unary_ng with more implementations: RELU, TANH, SQUARE, SWISH, SINH. Standard tanh_tile() available in SFPU.
Analyzed codebase: found TANH kernel, parameterized ops (HARDTANH, SOFTSHRINK, XIELU), composite ops, and SFPU patterns. Ready to select top 5 references.
Selected top 5 references: tanh (core math), hardtanh (parameter handling), softshrink (single param), xielu (multi param), tanhshrink (tanh composite). Written to reference_selection.md
